release_notes: OLED 2.42 beta build 42. Updates the OLED web UI to match the 4-inch web UI style with colored section lines, cleaner collapsible cards, UTF-8 fixes, and a non-collapsible current status panel. Adds main-screen insulin information including IOB now, total bolus dose today, and last bolus dose/time. Improves Nightscout treatment reading by checking the latest 50 treatments and recalculating insulin activity on startup.
